init.welcome: Welcome to multiagents-decanting. I'll run a brief Discovery, one question at a time.
init.q1_objetivo: What is the main goal of the project, in one sentence?
init.q2_usuarios: Who uses the result, and how?
init.q3_stack: What technology/stack is already decided (language, frameworks, infra), or still open?
init.q4_tipo: What kind of project is it? ML/pipeline, web app, CLI/automation, game, document/content, or other?
init.q5_restricoes: Any non-obvious constraints? (compliance, sensitive data, tight deadline, small team)
init.q6_budget: What daily token budget is reasonable? (default $50)
init.done: Done. Multiagent project initialized in native decanting mode.
enable.done: {agente} enabled and ready to be invoked via the Agent tool.
trust.friction.low: Low score: medium+ risk actions require human confirmation.
trust.friction.mid: Mid score: only irreversible actions require confirmation.
trust.friction.high: High score: high autonomy; only catastrophic actions require confirmation.
guardrail.force_push: Blocked: push --force to main. Confirm explicitly with the user first.
guardrail.rm_rf: Blocked: rm -rf outside the project root.
guardrail.secret: Blocked: file appears to contain a secret. Remove it before committing.
